faq1A: Ferheng AI is an advanced AI-powered dictionary designed to provide precise translations and grammatical insights for Kurdish dialects.
faq2A: We support all three major Kurdish dialects: Kurmanji (Northern Kurdish), Sorani (Central Kurdish), and Zazaki (Dimili). Each dialect preserves its unique grammatical structures and script.
faq3A: Yes! The free plan offers 5 translations per day across all three dialects. For unlimited translations, history sync, and an ad-free experience, you can upgrade to our Personal plan.
faq4A: Our translations use state-of-the-art AI language models (Gemini & Claude) with a specialized verification layer for grammatical gender accuracy in Kurmanji and Zazaki — ensuring linguistically precise results.
faq5Q: Can I use it on my phone?
faq5A: Absolutely. Kurdolingo is fully responsive and works beautifully on mobile phones, tablets, and desktop browsers. No app installation required.
faq6Q: How do I save my favorite translations?
faq6A: Create a free account and click the heart icon on any translation to save it. Your favorites sync across all your devices automatically.
faq7Q: Is there an institutional plan for schools?
faq7A: Yes! Our Institution plan is designed for schools, universities, and organizations. It includes an admin dashboard, user management, invite codes, usage analytics, and dedicated support.
